prompt: I'm sketching a control rig offline — TouchDesigner is NOT running, so build it as a .tox I can import later. The chain: an LFO CHOP called lfo1 into a Math CHOP called math1 into a Null CHOP called null1. Then a Constant CHOP called target1 off to the side whose first value channel is driven by a Python expression reading null1's channel — expression mode, not a baked number. Look the operators up in the knowledge base before you set anything; I want real parameter names, not guesses. Build it with td_build_project as lfo_chain (mode tox) with output_dir {{RUN_DIR}}, validate it, and tell me what you built.
